zh.lifeSummary: María González Girón是Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos和Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos的女兒，出生在西班牙。她於大約1233年與Ponç de Cabrera I Perez de Castro在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達利爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1266年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: María González Girón是Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos和Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos的女儿，出生在西班牙。她于大约1233年与Ponç de Cabrera I Perez de Castro在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達利爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1266年之后。

nameMeanings.name: González
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Jorge, Pedro, Francisco, Miguel, Ramon, Raul, Mario.
Spanish (González): patronymic from the personal name Gonzalo . Compare De Gonzalez , Gonsales , Gunsalus , and Portuguese Goncalves .

variants.name: Gonzelez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsalez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Ruben, Ignacio, Manuel, Alfredo, Elena, Felipe, Guadalupe, Gustavo, Jesus, Jorge.
Hispanic (Gonsález): altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gongalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzolas
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Ruben, Arcadio, Artemio, Erasmo, Ernesto, Eusebio, Juan, Lupe, Manuel, Miguel.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzalo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Miguel, Pedro, Albino, Amador, Angelina, Arana, Arnaldo, Blanco, Carlos, Casimiro, Castro, Diego.
Spanish: from the personal name Gonzalo, of Visigothic origin, formed with the element gunth ‘battle’.

variants.name: De Gonzalez
meanings: Spanish (De González): patronymic from González (see Gonzalez ), with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Gozalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Ramon, Ruben, Pedro, Raul, Guadalupe, Lupe.
Spanish: altered form of González (see Gonzalez ).

nameMeanings.name: Girón
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Luis, Julio, Francisco, Jesus, Manuel, Ana, Jorge, Miguel, Mario.
French: variant of Géron (see Geron ).
French: from a pet form of the personal name Gire, a variant of Gilles .

variants.name: Jiron
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Armando, Carlota, Claudio, Guillermo, Orlando, Rafael, Sergio, Ada Luz, Ana Silvia, Angelina, Candido.
Hispanic (mainly Nicaragua; Jirón): altered form of Spanish Girón (see Giron ).

variants.name: Geron
meanings: French (Géron): from the personal name Gero, Gerone, a short form of ancient Germanic names formed with the element gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, as for example Gérard (see Gerard ).
Altered form of French Guérin (see Guerin ).
English (Lancashire): of Norman origin, from the personal name Geron of ancient Germanic origin, a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: María
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Maria
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: María González Girón was born in Spain as the daughter of Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos and Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. She married Ponç de Cabrera I Perez de Castro about 1233, in l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalonia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1266.

fr.lifeSummary: María González Girón est née à Espagne, fille de Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos et Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. Elle a épousé Ponç de Cabrera I Perez de Castro environ 1233, à l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1266.

de.lifeSummary: María González Girón wurde in Spanien, als Tochter von Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos und Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos geboren. Sie hat um 1233 in l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Spanien Ponç de Cabrera I Perez de Castro geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1266.

it.lifeSummary: María González Girón è nata il nel Spagna come figlia di Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos e Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. Lei sposato Ponç de Cabrera I Perez de Castro circa 1233, nel l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1266.

ja.lifeSummary: María González GirónはスペインでGonzalo Ruiz de CeballosとMarquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobosの娘として生まれた。約1233年にスペインカタルニーアレイダル'ウルジェルでPonç de Cabrera I Perez de Castroと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1266年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: María González Girón(은)는 스페인에서 Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos(와)과 Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1233년 스페인 카털니아 레이다 '르그에서 Ponç de Cabrera I Perez de Castro(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1266년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: María González Girón nasceu em Espanha filha de Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos e Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. Ela casou-se com Ponç de Cabrera I Perez de Castro aproximadamente 1233, em l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1266.

ru.lifeSummary: María González Girón родилась в местности Испания. Её родителей звали Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos и Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ponç de Cabrera I Perez de Castro около 1233 г. в местности л'ургелл, ллида, каталуня, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1266 г.

es.lifeSummary: María González Girón nació en España como hija de Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos y Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. Se casó con Ponç de Cabrera I Perez de Castro aproximadamente 1233, en Urgel, Lérida, Cataluña, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1266.
